TextView.android:text: Water supply will be interrupted from 9 AM – 1 PM this Saturday for routine maintenance. Please store water accordingly.
Community BBQ this Sunday at the rooftop 🔥
Starting 5 PM. Food will be provided — just bring your drinks and good vibes! Everyone is welcome.
Elevator servicing complete — Block A & B
Both elevators in Block A and B have been fully serviced and are now operational. Thank you for your patience.
